message: feat: block network resources in rendered markdown view

files.patch:
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ struct RenderedHTMLBuilder {
         <head>
           <meta charset=\"utf-8\" />
           <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1\" />
+          <meta http-equiv=\"Content-Security-Policy\" content=\"default-src 'none'; style-src 'unsafe-inline'; img-src data: file:;\" />
           <style>
           \(stylesheet())
           </style>
